ADVISING Students are only required to meet with an advisor when ready to declare the minor. Students may meet with an advisor at any time by reaching out to aosc-advise@umd.edu. Other questions about advising or adding the Atmospheric Chemistry minor can also be directed to aosc- advise@umd.edu.
